title: Cuneiform Tablet #0598: Middle Babylonian Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
